_comment: Story layer tuning + copy. WS-N owns this file. R-rated register per GAME_DESIGN.md; punch at the system.
ambientHeadlines: PLATFORM DENIES EVERYTHING, ANNOUNCES NOTHING, PROFITS ANYWAY
STUDY: WATCHING SOMEONE ELSE GAMBLE NOW COUNTS AS CARDIO
MODERATION TEAM REDUCED TO ONE GUY NAMED KEVIN AND A SPREADSHEET
AD REVENUE UP 40% — EXECUTIVES CREDIT 'THE CONTENT, WHATEVER IT IS'
INTERN WHO READ THE TOS HOSPITALIZED FOR EXHAUSTION
SPONSORS INSIST GAMBLING STREAMS ARE 'FINANCIAL LITERACY CONTENT'
SITE UPTIME 99.9%; MORAL UPTIME UNMEASURED SINCE LAUNCH
CEO: 'WE TAKE THIS SERIOUSLY' — LAUGHTER HEARD OFF-CAMERA
REGULATOR OPENS TAB, FORGETS WHY, ORDERS LUNCH

tos_break: LIVE TOS VIOLATION ON FRONT PAGE — CURATOR 'LOOKING INTO IT'
ANOTHER ONE: {streamer} DETONATES ON THE HOMEPAGE
COMPLIANCE 'DEEPLY CONCERNED', FRONT PAGE STILL PRINTING MONEY
audit: REGULATORS RAID THE FRONT PAGE — FINES ISSUED, LESSONS PENDING
SNAP AUDIT FINDS EXACTLY WHAT EVERYONE ALREADY KNEW
jackpot: GAMBLER WINS BIG LIVE; PLATFORM WINS BIGGER QUIETLY
JACKPOT ON {streamer} — FINANCE DEPARTMENT SEEN HIGH-FIVING
viral: {streamer} GOES VIRAL — LAWYERS PLACED ON STANDBY
sponsor_warning: SPONSOR 'DISAPPOINTED' IN HOMEPAGE, THREATENS TO TAKE MONEY ELSEWHERE

beats.headline: LEAKED MEMO: EXECUTIVES KNEW FRONT PAGE WAS 'A LIABILITY FARM'
beats.message: 📄 A memo leaked. Your name is in a footnote. A journalist just slid into your DMs.

beats.headline: FORMAL INQUIRY OPENED INTO PLATFORM CURATION PRACTICES
beats.message: 🏛️ A formal inquiry is open. Legal wants to 'align on narrative'. Heat +10.

beats.headline: HEARING SCHEDULED — CURATOR SUBPOENAED AS 'PERSON OF INTEREST'
beats.message: ⚖️ You've been subpoenaed. Reputation −5. The journalist wants one last answer.

endings.title: THE WHISTLEBLOWER
endings.body: You fed the journalist everything — the memos, the metrics, the sponsor deals nobody was supposed to see. The hearing turns into a bloodbath and for once it isn't yours. Management burns; you trend for a week as 'the one employee with a spine'. You will never work in curation again, and honestly? That's the reward.

endings.title: INDICTED, WITH BONUS
endings.body: You survived the quarter, smashed the quota, and got named in the indictment — in the same week. Legal says don't worry. Finance wires the bonus anyway, because the numbers were incredible and someone upstairs decided that legally speaking, vibes are not admissible. Court date pending. Yacht deposit cleared.

endings.title: MADE CEO
endings.body: Quota crushed, scandals contained, regulators bored. The board doesn't understand how you did it and doesn't want to. They just want it repeated at scale — so the front page is someone else's problem now, and every curator in the building reports to you. You are the system you used to feed. Congratulations, monster.

endings.title: THE SCAPEGOAT
endings.body: The inquiry needed a face and management needed a firewall, and holy shit are you both. Every decision that made them money is suddenly a decision you made alone, unsupervised, possibly out of malice. The press release calls you 'a rogue curator'. Your badge stopped working before the meeting ended.

endings.title: QUIETLY REPLACED
endings.body: No scandal, no hearing, no drama — you just didn't make the number. Security walks you out past your replacement, who is already being told the sponsor requirements. The front page doesn't even flicker. In six months nobody here will remember which one you were.
